name: Jypra SEO Intelligence Agent
_comment: Import via n8n -> Workflows -> Import from File. Set SERPAPI_KEY and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n environment variables. To run all keywords, add a Google Sheets / CSV read node before 'Set Keyword + Target' and loop. To add a Google Sheet output, append a Google Sheets 'Append' node after 'Parse + Finalise'.
